title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Sabo, Dragon, Imu as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't make direct contact without an encryption snail...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so I rerouted my call through the island while we were setting sail.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew the government would intercept the signal, but doing it like that was sure to fool them into thinking I was still on lullusia.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, I was just within range, having already set out to sea with our new enlisted.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So, the AnnInllation of Luluia...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: really did happen duringk that call...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah... everyone onboard was hysterical. A lot of them had family on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They saw their country obligated right in front of their eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: despicable... how in the world did they do it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An enormous shadow seemed to engulf the sky above us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And the next moment, everything was gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: An enormous shadow?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way it was caused by a living thing or some natural disaster.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Something pitch black was flying above the clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sabo... earlier, you said they used the name "IMU."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This may be a little out there, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...when the world ve know today VaaS created 800 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: One of the first 20 sovereigns...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Vas Saint Innu of House Nerona.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now look at this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since ve know an ability grantingk eternal youth is said to exist, that must mean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: SSSOMEONE HAS USED IT BEFORE, RIGHT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means there is a person out there that doesn't need to worry about death!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You think the one I saw is...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It could be a coincidence. Maybe they just share the same name, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could anyone else but a founder command the five Elder planets, the highest of World Nobles?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The celestial dragons fancy themselves as the "descendants of the gods" after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: One more things!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Assumingk the object you saw above the clouds...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...VAS A VEAPON MADE BY THE GOVERN- MENT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then the only one capable of creatingk such a things would be vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold it, VA. VEGAPunk would never intentionally design a dedicated killing machine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I know!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what if it VAS an ancient weapon?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Assumingk IMU has been livingk since ancient times... there is a connection!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Robin told us that the ancient weapons...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do, in fact, exist... but if this person had such a weapon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...Why wait till now to use it?!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
